extra.reason: Added AF external and embedded-libraries entry to .pkgmeta
Updated JetTools.toc: SavedVariablesPerCharacter → SavedVariables, added AF toc to load order
Core.lua rewritten: profile data model, full profile API, settings routed through active profile, live-reload on profile switch, AF.RegisterAddon call

Options.lua fully rewritten with AF-based UI: headered frame, left sidebar with ButtonGroup radio selection, profile dropdown/new/delete strip, right ScrollFrame with per-module pane populated from GetOptions() schema using AF widgets
Options.lua fully rewritten with pure WoW API widgets (no AbstractFramework). RequiredDeps removed from .toc, required-dependencies removed from .pkgmeta, AF reference removed from Core.lua.
CombatRes tracker module implemented in Modules/CombatRes.lua
Combat tab groups CombatStatus/CombatTimer/CombatRes; Reminders tab groups PetReminders/StealthReminder
